name: Soft Breadsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Gradually add milk and stir to form a soft dough.
3. Turn the dough onto a floured surface and knead gently 3-4 times.
4. Roll into a rectangle measuring 10 in x 5 in x 1/2 in.
5. Cut into 12 breadsticks.
6. Place butter in a baking pan measuring 13 in x 9 in x 2 in.
7. Arrange the breadsticks in the butter, turning to coat evenly.
8. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
9. Bake at 450°F for 14-18 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Serve warm.
